linkedin.text:
Prague isn't just beautiful. It's transformative.

Last year, we produced a 3-day leadership retreat for 80 executives inside a baroque palace.

The agenda:
→ Welcome dinner in a 17th-century monastery cellar
→ Strategy workshop in a private castle overlooking the Vltava
→ Black-tie awards gala with a live string quartet under crystal chandeliers

Prague gives you what no conference room can: a sense of occasion.

Every meal felt like an event. Every venue told a story. Every moment reinforced one message: your company invests in excellence.

The cost? Less than you'd spend on a forgettable hotel ballroom in London.

Prague. Where elegance meets edge.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Prague #CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #LeadershipRetreat #EventProduction #UproductionEvents #MICE #Europe
